markdown:
#  What is the difference between a labor productivity budget view and field production report? 
##  Answer 
When using Procore's reporting and budget features to track labor hours and costs with Procore's [Resource Tracking](https://www.procore.com/field-productivity) tools under 'Resource Management', it helps to understand the differences between these items:
**Field Production Report to Track Labor** **Hours**
  * Field Production Reports are designed to help project foremen and superintendents in the field track and compare budgeted labor hours entered in the project's Timesheets tool. 
  * This provides the field team with real-time insights into productivity rates and corresponding cost codes, allowing them to make more informed decisions while on-site. 
  * Field Production Reports can be accessed from the project's Reports or Timesheets tool. See [Set Up a Field Production Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/tutorials/set-up-a-field-production-report) and [View a Field Production Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/tutorials/view-a-field-production-report). 


**Budget View for Real-Time Labor Productivity**
  * The budget view is designed for project managers and accountants who want to monitor a project's budget in real-time to identify labor cost overruns. 
  * You can create a Real-Time Labor Costing budget view that leverages Procore unit-based budget columns and a 'Timesheet Hours' column as described in [Resource Tracking and Project Financials: Setup Guide](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/).   
This recommended budget view lets you track real-time labor costs as timecard entries are submitted in these Procore tools: Timesheets, Timecard, My Time (Android), My Time (iOS).

title: What is the difference between a labor productivity budget view and field production report?
description: Explains the difference between real-time labor productivity budget view and field production report
